sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ رِيَادَةُ الْأَعْمَالِ رِحْلَةً مَلِيئَةً بِالتَّحَدِّيَاتِ الَّتِي تَتَطَلَّبُ الصَّبْرَ وَالتَّفْكِيرَ الْإِبْدَاعِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Preduzetništvo se smatra putovanjem ispunjenim izazovima koji zahtijevaju strpljenje i kreativno razmišljanje.
sentences.translationEn: Entrepreneurship is a journey filled with challenges that require patience and creative thinking.

sentences.arabic: يَطْمَحُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ إِلَى تَأْسِيسِ مَشَارِيعِهِمُ الْخَاصَّةِ لِتَحْقِيقِ الِاسْتِقْلَالِ الْمَالِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi ljudi teže osnivanju vlastitih projekata kako bi postigli finansijsku nezavisnost.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people aspire to establish their own projects to achieve financial independence.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّ النَّجَاحَ فِي هَذَا الْمَجَالِ يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى دِرَاسَةٍ عَمِيقَةٍ لِاحْتِيَاجَاتِ الْجُمْهُورِ الْمُسْتَهْدَفِ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, uspjeh u ovoj oblasti zavisi od duboke studije potreba ciljne publike.
sentences.translationEn: However, success in this field depends on a deep study of the target audience's needs.

sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْمُخَاطَرَةُ جُزْءًا أَصِيلًا مِنَ الْعَمَلِيَّةِ، لَكِنَّهَا يَجِبُ أَنْ تَكُونَ مَحْسُوبَةً وَمَبْنِيَّةً عَلَى بَيَانَاتٍ دَقِيقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Preuzimanje rizika se smatra sastavnim dijelom procesa, ali on mora biti proračunat i zasnovan na preciznim podacima.
sentences.translationEn: Risk-taking is an inherent part of the process, but it must be calculated and based on accurate data.

sentences.arabic: الْقَادَةُ الْمُبْتَكِرُونَ هُمُ الَّذِينَ يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَحْوِيلَ الْعَقَبَاتِ إِلَى فُرَصٍ لِلنُّمُوِّ وَالتَّوَسُّعِ.
sentences.translation: Inovativni lideri su oni koji mogu pretvoriti prepreke u prilike za rast i širenje.
sentences.translationEn: Innovative leaders are those who can turn obstacles into opportunities for growth and expansion.
